# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# AI PCAP Network Analyser — Python dependencies
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Install:  pip install -r requirements.txt
# Python:   3.9 or newer recommended
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# ── REQUIRED — Live capture from Extreme / Cisco switches ────────────────────
paramiko>=3.0.0            # SSH transport for live switch capture (--protocol ssh)
scp>=0.15.0                # PCAP file transfer from switch over SCP

# ── OPTIONAL — AI / semantic search features ─────────────────────────────────
# Only needed if using the built-in knowledge retriever / semantic PCAP search.
# Comment out if you do not need AI features (saves ~1 GB of download).
sentence-transformers>=2.2.2   # Semantic embedding for protocol knowledge base
numpy>=1.24.0                  # Required by sentence-transformers

# ── OPTIONAL — Ollama / local LLM (no pip package needed) ────────────────────
# Ollama runs as a local service.  Install from https://ollama.com/
# The dashboard connects to it automatically at http://localhost:11434
# No pip install required.

# ── STDLIB — All other imports are Python standard library ───────────────────
# os, json, struct, time, threading, webbrowser, socket, argparse, sys,
# base64, subprocess, signal, tempfile, re, platform, pathlib, math,
# hashlib, http.server, urllib, csv, io, queue, stat, select, fcntl,
# pty  (Unix/macOS only — not required on Windows)
